text: Performing keyhole surgery has never been a walk in the park, but surgeons in London are receiving a helping robotic hand.
It's almost like you're inside the patient doing the operation.

Guy's and St Thomas' Hospital pioneered robotic surgery and now, in front of a live audience, they're demonstrating the latest in robot technology by performing an operation to remove the prostate gland from a patient.
And the robot has really helped us deliver what we think is a really top-end service.
